mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID as userId, STAGE_LEVEL as stageLevel, STAGE_STATUS as stageStatus, UPDATED_AT as updatedAt FROM USER_PVE_PROGRESS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY STAGE_LEVEL ASC
SELECT USER_ID as userId, STAGE_LEVEL as stageLevel, STAGE_STATUS as stageStatus, UPDATED_AT as updatedAt FROM USER_PVE_PROGRESS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND STAGE_LEVEL = #{stageLevel}
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_PVE_PROGRESS SET STAGE_STATUS = #{stageStatus}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND STAGE_LEVEL = #{stageLevel}
